title: Lattice Fundamentals: The Mathematical Foundation of Post-Quantum Cryptography
description: Master the mathematical structures underlying modern post-quantum cryptography. Understand lattices, bases, fundamental domains, and why these structures enable quantum-resistant security.
learningObjectives: Define lattices mathematically and visualize their structure
Understand the relationship between bases and lattice geometry
Compute fundamental domains and lattice determinants
Explain why lattices are useful for cryptography
Implement basic lattice operations in code
Analyze the quality of lattice bases using orthogonality measures
